summary: Iteration 19 - Auto-Pilot Mode, Enhanced Questions & Templates Testing Complete. All 17 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend UI verified: Admin Resolve page has Auto-Settle and Manual tabs with Auto-Pilot START/STOP control. Content page has Questions tab with AUTO badges and Templates tab with One-Click Auto Template button. Template edit allows add/remove questions with question picker. Question form has auto-resolution config (Metric, Trigger, Type). CricketData.org API is rate limited (103+ hits today, limit 100) - settlement API calls may fail with 429.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 19 tested Auto-Pilot Mode, enhanced question form with auto_resolution, one-click template creation, template editing. CricketData.org Premium API (key: 32bc41b7-...) is rate limited today (103+ hits, limit 100). Auto-Pilot endpoints: POST /api/admin/autopilot/start, POST /api/admin/autopilot/stop, GET /api/admin/autopilot/status. Question auto_resolution has metric/trigger/resolution_type. Template edit allows add/remove questions via question picker. Admin UI: Resolve page has Auto-Settle/Manual tabs with Auto-Pilot control. Content page has Questions/Templates tabs.
